{"step_by_step_thinking": "Oral zidovudine to mother at 3rd trimester along with oral zidovudine to infant for 6 weeks is a well-established method to prevent mother-to-child transmission of HIV. Vitamin A prophylaxis to the mother is not mentioned as a preventive measure for HIV transmission. Vaginal delivery can increase the risk of HIV transmission if the mother has a high viral load. Stopping breast feeding is recommended to prevent HIV transmission through breast milk.", "answer_choice": "B"}
